name: Woodsman Heavy Flail
description: The Woodwights were a band of Eeders rebels who gave the royal authorities a run for their money about a decade ago. Eventually, every Woodwight was captured and quartered, but the flails they used continue to live on.
descriptionZh: 十来年之前，伊德斯有一帮反叛分子，自称“林鬼”，当年令王家头疼不已。这些人最终尽数被捕，遭车裂刑，不过他们的连枷却流传了下来。
